name: ai.djzs/trust-mcp
description: Deterministic pre-execution logic audit for trading agents. verify_pm_trade audits a prediction-market thesis and returns PASS to PROCEED, FAIL, or WAIT to HALT with flagged defects and a reproducible verdict_hash (paid: 0.25 USDC via x402 on Base). Free registry tools: query_pol_certificates (permanent Irys ProofOfLogic certificates) and query_agent_trust (live on-chain trust scores). Audit before act.
title: DJZS Trust MCP
